title: Henbrandt 24 x SILVER Ice Sparkling Fountain Candles (Packs of 2) - 48 Total.
features: 48 Single or 24 Twin Packs of 12cm Fountain Candles
Last approx 30 sec (for longer see 15cm fountains)
Silver Holographic Wrapped to match Decor
Box/Carton may be of a different design
description: Product description 24 x packs of 2 fountain candles, total of 48 per box To use remove spike fountain end and place on other end which will reveal touch paper Light touch paper and stand well back NB: Refurbish condition = Slight seconds due to yellowing of plastic spike. Safety Warning Please keep candles away from flammable materials. Do not leave candles unattended. Dispose of candle residue properly.
